title: Ingestion Flatline (No Bronze Rows for 5 min)

annotations.summary: No new rows ingested into Bronze layer for 5 minutes
annotations.description: bronze.pg_transactions_raw has not received new rows (based on _ingested_at).

model.rawSql: SELECT count() AS recent_rows FROM bronze.pg_transactions_raw WHERE _ingested_at >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE
